Perfect! I have gathered comprehensive information about the Kapow web frontend. Let me now compile a detailed inventory for you.

---

## Comprehensive Inventory of Kapow Web Frontend

### Routes & Pages

The application defines **4 main routes** in `/web/src/App.tsx`:

1. **`/`** — Home page
2. **`/search`** — Search results & filter page
3. **`/about`** — About page
4. **`/auth/callback`** — OAuth callback handler (internal)

---

### Page Components

#### 1. Home Page (`/web/src/pages/Home.tsx`)
**Purpose**: Landing page with search quickstart and feature overview

**Key Elements**:
- **Hero Section**
  - Title: "College Power Search"
  - Tagline: "Find your perfect college — by academics, cost, location, athletics, and more"
  - Quick search form with 4 input fields:
    - Name search (college name) — `TextInput`
    - State dropdown — NativeSelect (50 US states + "Any state")
    - Ranking filter — Dropdown: Top 25, 50, 100, 200
    - Major search — TextInput (e.g. "Biology")
  - Actions:
    - **"Search" button** (primary) — navigates to `/search?q=...&state=...&rank_us_news_national=...&fields_of_study=...`
    - **"More filters ›" link** — goes to `/search` with same params, allowing access to full filter sidebar

- **Sample Searches Carousel**
  - 6 pre-built search cards with icons, titles, descriptions
  - Sample searches: Top 25 National, Affordable in CA, D1 Small Schools, Selective & Affordable, D3 New England, Sunny & Affordable
  - Clicking a sample search card navigates to `/search?...` with preset filters
  - Carousel shows 3 cards at a time on desktop, 1 on mobile; includes navigation arrows

- **"Why College Power Search?" Feature Cards** (3 cards)
  - Comprehensive Data — thousands of colleges, acceptance rates, SAT scores, net price, graduation outcomes
  - Faceted Search — combine filters across academics, cost, location, size, campus culture
  - Save & Compare — build college lists, save searches, compare schools side-by-side

---

#### 2. Search Page (`/web/src/pages/Search.tsx`)
**Purpose**: Main search interface with faceted filtering, results display, and multiple view modes

**Layout**: Responsive two-column layout (sidebar + main content)
- **Desktop (≥62em)**: Fixed 280px sidebar on left + full-width results area
- **Mobile (<62em)**: Collapsible filters above results; "Show/Hide Filters" toggle button

**Features**:

##### A. Filter Sidebar
Located on the left (or in a collapsible section on mobile). Contains:

1. **Your Location** section
   - `LocationInput` component allows:
     - Enter 5-digit ZIP code → resolves to lat/lng/state via `ResolveZip` GraphQL query
     - Browser geolocation button (asks for permission)
     - Displays selected location with clear/edit options
   - Used for distance-based sorting and filtering

2. **Custom Ranking Blend** (`RankingBlendBuilder`)
   - Interactive sliders for 7 ranking sources:
     - US News National, US News Liberal Arts, Forbes
     - Washington Monthly National, Washington Monthly Liberal Arts
     - Niche, Money Score
   - Each slider: 0–100, step 5
   - Shows percentage of total weight for each selected source
   - "Reset" button to clear all weights
   - When blend is active: search results are sorted by blend score, custom sort is disabled

3. **Dynamic Filters** (grouped by theme)
   - Filters loaded from GraphQL `searchFields` query
   - Grouped by theme: **ACADEMICS**, **ADMISSIONS**, **COST**, **LOCATION**, **OUTCOMES**, **RANKING**, **ATHLETICS**, **CULTURE**, **CLIMATE**
   - For each theme section: label header + list of filter controls
   - Filter types and UI:
     - **Single Enum** (e.g. NCAA Division) → Radio buttons or single select
     - **Multi Enum** (e.g. State, Region) → Checkboxes (inline if ≤6 options; searchable dropdown if >6)
     - **Numerical Range** (e.g. Enrollment, Net Price) → Slider with min/max
     - **Full-Text Search** (e.g. Major, Field of Study) → Text input with autocomplete
     - **Geographic** (distance from point) → Radius slider + location input
   - Each filter has:
     - Descriptive label
     - Info icon with tooltip (field description)
     - Data source tooltip (icon linking to source)
   - Filters update URL params in real-time; changing a filter resets pagination to page 1

##### B. Results Area (Main Content)
Top toolbar:
- **"Results" heading** + result count display: "Showing X–Y of Z institutions" (capped at 100 max)
- **View Toggle** (SegmentedControl with 4 icons):
  - Card view (grid layout, 3 cols on desktop)
  - List view (compact list)
  - Table view (full data table)
  - Map view (Leaflet-based geographic visualization)
- **"Sort by distance" button** (only visible when location is set; toggles distance sort)
- **"Columns" button** (only in table view) — opens popover to show/hide columns and reorder via drag-and-drop
- **"Export PDF" button** — downloads PDF of results with active filters
- **"Export CSV" button** — downloads CSV to `/api/export/csv?...`

**Results Display Modes**:

1. **Card View** (default)
   - SimpleGrid: 1 col on mobile, 2 on tablet, 3 on desktop
   - Each card:
     - Institution name (dark blue, bold, clickable)
     - City, State (smaller, gray)
     - Distance (if location set) — icon + miles
     - Net Price (if shown) — icon + currency
     - Click to open detail modal

2. **List View**
   - Full-width list of institutions
   - Each row:
     - Institution name (left, clickable)
     - City, State (right)
     - Distance & net price (if applicable)
     - Hover: light background highlight
     - Click to open detail modal

3. **Table View**
   - Horizontally scrollable data table
   - Pinned "Name" column (leftmost)
   - Other columns: configurable via "Columns" button
   - Default visible columns: Name, City, State, Distance, MyPrice, + others based on `defaultVisible`
   - Column reordering via drag-and-drop
   - Sortable columns (click header to sort ASC → DESC → no sort)
   - Sorting disabled when ranking blend is active
   - Click institution row to open detail modal

4. **Map View**
   - Leaflet-based map centered on results
   - Zoom/pan to fit all institutions
   - Markers for each institution
   - Click marker to open detail modal
   - User location shown as a blue circle if set

**Pagination**
- Appears when total results > page size
- Controls:
  - Pagination component: "< 1 2 3 ... >"
  - Page size dropdown: 5, 10, 20 (default), 50, 100 options
  - Label: "Per page"
- Max 100 results displayed; if API returns >100 total, shows "X+ results" indicator

**Loading & Error States**
- Loading: 3 skeleton card placeholders
- Error: "Something went wrong" message + "Retry" button
- No results: "No colleges match your filters" message + "Clear all filters" button

##### C. Detail Modal (`InstitutionDetail`)
Triggered by clicking any institution from results view.
- Modal dialog showing:
  - Institution name, city, state
  - Key metrics:
    - Enrollment
    - Admission rate
    - Graduation rate
    - Retention rate
    - Student-faculty ratio
    - Institution type (Public / Private nonprofit / Private for-profit)
    - In-state & out-of-state tuition
    - Average net price
  - **"Similar Institutions"** section (links to other institutions with same characteristics)
- Close button to dismiss modal
- Responsive: full-screen on mobile, centered dialog on desktop

---

#### 3. About Page (`/web/src/pages/About.tsx`)
**Purpose**: Explain the product mission, differentiators, and data sources

**Sections**:

1. **Hero**
   - Icon: GraduationCap in a dark blue box
   - Title: "About College Power Search"
   - Description: Mission statement about comprehensive search tool and free access

2. **Our Mission**
   - Heading + two paragraphs explaining the problem (limited filters, single-ranking silos) and solution (free, open, multi-dimensional data)

3. **What Sets Us Apart** (4 feature cards)
   - Comprehensive Data — aggregates from NCES, rankings, public sources
   - Powerful Filters — dozens of dimensions
   - Rankings & Comparisons — multiple providers + custom blending
   - Location-Aware — proximity, in-state vs out-of-state costs, climate

4. **Our Data** (data sources section, grouped by category)
   - **Government Data**
     - National Center for Education Statistics (NCES IPEDS)
     - U.S. Census Bureau
   - **Rankings**
     - US News National & Liberal Arts
     - Forbes
     - Washington Monthly National & Liberal Arts
     - Niche
     - Money Score
   - **Other Sources**
     - NCAA (athletics divisions)
     - FiveThirtyEight (partisan data)
     - Köppen Climate Classification
     - Common App (application platforms)
   - Each source card:
     - Name, description
     - "Visit source" link (external icon) to official URL

---

#### 4. Auth Callback Page (`/web/src/pages/AuthCallback.tsx`)
**Purpose**: OAuth callback handler (silent redirect)

- Displays:
  - Loader (spinning indicator)
  - "Completing sign in..." message
- On load:
  - Calls `supabase.auth.getSession()` to retrieve session from URL fragment
  - Stores session in auth store
  - Redirects to home page (`/`)
- Used internally by Google OAuth flow

---

### Header Component (`/web/src/components/layout/Header.tsx`)

**Layout**: Sticky header at top, dark blue background (`--color-primary`)

**Content** (responsive):

1. **Logo/Wordmark** (always visible)
   - Graduation cap icon (gold, `--color-accent`)
   - Text: "College Power Search"
   - Clickable → navigates to home

2. **Desktop Navigation** (visible ≥768px)
   - Links: Home, About
   - Active link: gold; inactive: semi-transparent white

3. **Auth Section** (desktop & mobile)
   - If loading: nothing shown
   - If signed out: **"Sign In" button** → dropdown menu with "Continue with Google" option
     - Triggers `supabase.auth.signInWithOAuth({ provider: 'google', redirectTo: '/auth/callback' })`
   - If signed in: **User Menu** → dropdown showing:
     - Full name (from metadata)
     - Email
     - Avatar (from metadata, or initials fallback)
     - "Sign out" option (red text)

4. **Mobile Navigation** (visible <768px)
   - Hamburger menu icon (white)
   - Opens drawer with:
     - Navigation links (Home, About)
     - Auth section (Sign In button or User Menu)
   - Drawer title: "Navigation"
   - Click link or auth action closes drawer

---

### Footer Component (`/web/src/components/layout/Footer.tsx`)

**Layout**: Dark blue background, sticky to bottom

**Content**:
- Graduation cap icon (gold)
- "College Power Search" text (white)
- Copyright notice: "© [year] College Power Search. All rights reserved."
- Desktop: side-by-side layout
- Mobile: stacked, centered

---

### Search Components (Detailed)

#### `FilterControl.tsx` — Renders filter UI based on field type
- For each field type, renders appropriate widget:
  - **Text input** for substring search
  - **Slider** for numeric ranges (min/max)
  - **Checkboxes** for multi-select enums (inline if ≤6 options, searchable dropdown otherwise)
  - **Radio buttons** for single-select enums
- Label with info tooltip + data source tooltip
- Supports min/max selections for multi-enum fields

#### `LocationInput.tsx` — Geographic location picker
- ZIP code input (5 digits)
  - On valid input: auto-queries `ResolveZip` GraphQL to get lat/lng/state
  - Shows city, state if resolved
- Browser geolocation button (requests permission, uses `navigator.geolocation`)
- Clear/edit location button
- Displays formatted location name (e.g. "San Francisco, CA")
- Returns: `{ latitude, longitude, state?, displayName? }`

#### `RankingBlendBuilder.tsx` — Custom ranking weight sliders
- 7 ranking sources with independent sliders (0–100, step 5)
- Shows percentage of total weight in real-time
- "Reset" button to clear all weights
- When weights set: enables custom "blend score" sorting in results

#### `ViewToggle.tsx` — Result view mode switcher
- 4-option SegmentedControl: Card | List | Table | Map icons
- Persists selection to localStorage (`kapow:results-view`)
- Can also be set via URL param `?view=...`

#### `ColumnPicker.tsx` — Table column visibility & reordering
- Grouped by theme (e.g. Academics, Cost, Outcomes)
- For each column:
  - Checkbox to toggle visibility
  - Up/down arrows to reorder (relative to visible columns)
- Drag-and-drop reordering (with visual feedback: dragging index highlight)
- Persists to localStorage (`kapow:visible-columns`, `kapow:column-order`)

#### `InstitutionCard.tsx` — Card view institution preview
- Displays:
  - Institution name (dark blue, bold)
  - City, State
  - Distance (if location set) + MapPin icon
  - Net price (if shown) + DollarSign icon
- Keyboard accessible: Enter/Space triggers click
- Cursor pointer on hover

#### `ResultsList.tsx` — List view results
- Compact rows with left-to-right info:
  - Institution name (left, dark blue, bold)
  - City, State (left)
  - Distance + Net price (right, gray)
- Separator lines between rows
- Keyboard accessible: Enter/Space triggers click

#### `ResultsMap.tsx` — Leaflet-based map view
- OpenStreetMap tiles
- Markers for all institutions
- Blue circle for user location (if set)
- Auto-fit bounds to all markers
- Click marker to open detail
- Zoom/pan controls built-in

#### `ResultsTable.tsx` — Data table for comprehensive view
- Pinned "Name" column (left)
- Scrollable other columns (configurable visibility & order)
- Sortable headers (ASC → DESC → no sort)
- Hover rows for readability
- Click row to open detail modal

#### `InstitutionDetail.tsx` — Modal detail view
- Two-column layout with metrics
- Key data fields (enrollment, tuition, graduation rate, etc.)
- Renders as Modal dialog
- Close button at top-right
- Includes "Similar Institutions" section (loads related schools)

#### `SampleSearchCarousel.tsx` — Home page carousel of preset searches
- Carousel component with 6 sample searches
- Each slide: card with icon, title, description, result count preview
- Clicking card navigates to `/search?...` with preset filters
- Responsive: 1 card on mobile, 2 on tablet, 3 on desktop
- Left/right navigation arrows
- Automatic looping

#### `SampleSearchCard.tsx` — Individual sample search card
- Icon + title + description
- Shows result count badge (e.g. "45 colleges match")
- Clickable; acts as link to search results

---

### Key Interactive Features

#### 1. **Search & Filter Workflow**
- User enters filters (name, state, ranking, location, etc.)
- Filters update URL params in real-time (`?name=...&state=...&rank_us_news_national=...&page=1&pageSize=20&view=card`)
- API called with `SearchQuery` GraphQL mutation, passing filters as `FilterInput[]`
- Results rendered in chosen view mode (card/list/table/map)
- Clicking institution opens detail modal (fetches via `InstitutionDetail` query)

#### 2. **Custom Ranking Blend**
- User adjusts sliders in `RankingBlendBuilder` to weight 7 ranking sources
- Weights serialized to URL: `?blend=us-news-national:50,forbes:30,niche:20`
- API receives `rankingBlend: [{ field, weight }]` and computes blended score
- Results sorted by `blendScore` (ASC/DESC sort overridden)

#### 3. **Location-Based Features**
- Enter ZIP code or use browser geolocation
- Enables:
  - "Sort by distance" button
  - Distance display on cards/list
  - Geospatial filter (radius search)
  - Distance column in table view

#### 4. **Column Customization** (Table Mode)
- Click "Columns" button → popover
- Toggle columns on/off (checkboxes)
- Drag-and-drop to reorder (excluding pinned "Name")
- Changes persist to localStorage
- Full set of output fields loaded from API

#### 5. **Pagination**
- Load page size from URL (`?pageSize=20`)
- Clicking page number or changing page size → updates URL + page param
- Max results capped at 100; older requests show "100+ results" indicator

#### 6. **Export**
- **Export PDF**: Generates client-side PDF with:
  - Institution table (up to 100 rows)
  - Active filter list
  - Column data based on visible columns
  - Branded with Kapow header/footer
- **Export CSV**: Server-side export to `/api/export/csv?...`
  - Includes all matching results (no 100-row cap)
  - Filters, sort, location all respected

#### 7. **Authentication**
- Click "Sign In" → Google OAuth redirect
- Callback handled at `/auth/callback` (silent)
- Session stored in `useAuthStore` (Zustand)
- If logged in: User Menu with avatar, name, email, sign-out option
- User session persists across page reloads (Supabase manages session in localStorage)

#### 8. **Responsive Behavior**
- **Desktop (≥62em)**: 2-column sidebar + main (fixed layout)
- **Tablet (768–992px)**: Sidebar collapsible above results (Show/Hide Filters toggle)
- **Mobile (<768px)**: Single column, filters collapsible, table scrollable horizontally
- Header navigation: compact menu drawer on mobile, horizontal nav on desktop
- Carousel slides fewer cards on smaller screens

---

### URL Query Parameters

All filterable via search params; common examples:

| Param | Example | Effect |
|---|---|---|
| `q` (legacy) | `?q=Stanford` | Searches institution name (converted to `name=...`) |
| `name` | `?name=Stanford` | Filters by institution name substring |
| `state` | `?state=CA` | Single-select state filter |
| `rank_us_news_national` | `?rank_us_news_national=25` | Ranking range filter |
| `enrollment` | `?enrollment=0,5000` | Numeric range (min,max) |
| `fields_of_study` | `?fields_of_study=Biology` | Major substring search |
| `userLat`, `userLng` | `?userLat=37.4&userLng=-122.1` | User location (decimal degrees) |
| `userState` | `?userState=CA` | State associated with location |
| `blend` | `?blend=us-news-national:50,forbes:30` | Ranking weights |
| `sort` | `?sort=distance` | Sort field |
| `sortDir` | `?sortDir=DESC` | Sort direction (ASC/DESC) |
| `view` | `?view=table` | Results view mode (card/list/table/map) |
| `page` | `?page=2` | Pagination (1-indexed) |
| `pageSize` | `?pageSize=50` | Results per page |

---

### Demo Flow (`demo/steps.ts`)

The interactive Playwright-driven demo cycles through **16 steps**:

1. Welcome screen (home page hero)
2. Quick search input (type "Stanford")
3. Add filters (state: CA, ranking: Top 50)
4. Submit search → navigate to results
5. Browse results (highlight rows in table)
6. Ranking blend showcase (highlight slider section)
7. Column picker (show/hide table columns)
8. Filter sidebar (highlight left sidebar)
9. Pagination (show page 2, discuss per-page options)
10. Sample searches (scroll to carousel, click sample)
11. About page (navigate & scroll content)
12. Tablet view (768px viewport, show filters collapse)
13. Tablet search (show/hide filters toggle)
14. Mobile view (375px viewport, show burger menu)
15. Mobile search (show/hide filters on small screen)
16. Demo complete (return to desktop home)

---

### Summary of User Actions

A user can:

1. **Search**: Enter college name, state, ranking tier, major on home page
2. **Filter**: Use 20+ facets (academics, cost, location, outcomes, rankings, athletics, culture, climate)
3. **Customize Ranking**: Blend 7 ranking sources with sliders
4. **Set Location**: Enter ZIP code or use geolocation
5. **View Results**: Choose card, list, table, or map view
6. **Sort**: By distance, or by any column in table mode
7. **Customize Columns**: Show/hide and reorder table columns (persisted)
8. **Pagination**: Navigate between result pages (5–100 per page)
9. **Detail**: Click any institution to open modal with full details
10. **Export**: Download results as PDF or CSV
11. **Sample Searches**: Click pre-built searches for quick exploration
12. **Sign In**: Google OAuth for (future) saved searches / favorites
13. **Learn**: Read About page for data sources and methodology
14. **Responsive**: Use on desktop, tablet, or mobile — layout adapts seamlessly

All data flows through GraphQL queries (`SearchFields`, `SearchOutputFields`, `Search`, `InstitutionDetail`, `ResolveZip`) and is persisted to URL params for shareable searches.

content.text:
Perfect! I have gathered comprehensive information about the Kapow web frontend. Let me now compile a detailed inventory for you.

---

## Comprehensive Inventory of Kapow Web Frontend

### Routes & Pages

The application defines **4 main routes** in `/web/src/App.tsx`:

1. **`/`** — Home page
2. **`/search`** — Search results & filter page
3. **`/about`** — About page
4. **`/auth/callback`** — OAuth callback handler (internal)

---

### Page Components

#### 1. Home Page (`/web/src/pages/Home.tsx`)
**Purpose**: Landing page with search quickstart and feature overview

**Key Elements**:
- **Hero Section**
  - Title: "College Power Search"
  - Tagline: "Find your perfect college — by academics, cost, location, athletics, and more"
  - Quick search form with 4 input fields:
    - Name search (college name) — `TextInput`
    - State dropdown — NativeSelect (50 US states + "Any state")
    - Ranking filter — Dropdown: Top 25, 50, 100, 200
    - Major search — TextInput (e.g. "Biology")
  - Actions:
    - **"Search" button** (primary) — navigates to `/search?q=...&state=...&rank_us_news_national=...&fields_of_study=...`
    - **"More filters ›" link** — goes to `/search` with same params, allowing access to full filter sidebar

- **Sample Searches Carousel**
  - 6 pre-built search cards with icons, titles, descriptions
  - Sample searches: Top 25 National, Affordable in CA, D1 Small Schools, Selective & Affordable, D3 New England, Sunny & Affordable
  - Clicking a sample search card navigates to `/search?...` with preset filters
  - Carousel shows 3 cards at a time on desktop, 1 on mobile; includes navigation arrows

- **"Why College Power Search?" Feature Cards** (3 cards)
  - Comprehensive Data — thousands of colleges, acceptance rates, SAT scores, net price, graduation outcomes
  - Faceted Search — combine filters across academics, cost, location, size, campus culture
  - Save & Compare — build college lists, save searches, compare schools side-by-side

---

#### 2. Search Page (`/web/src/pages/Search.tsx`)
**Purpose**: Main search interface with faceted filtering, results display, and multiple view modes

**Layout**: Responsive two-column layout (sidebar + main content)
- **Desktop (≥62em)**: Fixed 280px sidebar on left + full-width results area
- **Mobile (<62em)**: Collapsible filters above results; "Show/Hide Filters" toggle button

**Features**:

##### A. Filter Sidebar
Located on the left (or in a collapsible section on mobile). Contains:

1. **Your Location** section
   - `LocationInput` component allows:
     - Enter 5-digit ZIP code → resolves to lat/lng/state via `ResolveZip` GraphQL query
     - Browser geolocation button (asks for permission)
     - Displays selected location with clear/edit options
   - Used for distance-based sorting and filtering

2. **Custom Ranking Blend** (`RankingBlendBuilder`)
   - Interactive sliders for 7 ranking sources:
     - US News National, US News Liberal Arts, Forbes
     - Washington Monthly National, Washington Monthly Liberal Arts
     - Niche, Money Score
   - Each slider: 0–100, step 5
   - Shows percentage of total weight for each selected source
   - "Reset" button to clear all weights
   - When blend is active: search results are sorted by blend score, custom sort is disabled

3. **Dynamic Filters** (grouped by theme)
   - Filters loaded from GraphQL `searchFields` query
   - Grouped by theme: **ACADEMICS**, **ADMISSIONS**, **COST**, **LOCATION**, **OUTCOMES**, **RANKING**, **ATHLETICS**, **CULTURE**, **CLIMATE**
   - For each theme section: label header + list of filter controls
   - Filter types and UI:
     - **Single Enum** (e.g. NCAA Division) → Radio buttons or single select
     - **Multi Enum** (e.g. State, Region) → Checkboxes (inline if ≤6 options; searchable dropdown if >6)
     - **Numerical Range** (e.g. Enrollment, Net Price) → Slider with min/max
     - **Full-Text Search** (e.g. Major, Field of Study) → Text input with autocomplete
     - **Geographic** (distance from point) → Radius slider + location input
   - Each filter has:
     - Descriptive label
     - Info icon with tooltip (field description)
     - Data source tooltip (icon linking to source)
   - Filters update URL params in real-time; changing a filter resets pagination to page 1

##### B. Results Area (Main Content)
Top toolbar:
- **"Results" heading** + result count display: "Showing X–Y of Z institutions" (capped at 100 max)
- **View Toggle** (SegmentedControl with 4 icons):
  - Card view (grid layout, 3 cols on desktop)
  - List view (compact list)
  - Table view (full data table)
  - Map view (Leaflet-based geographic visualization)
- **"Sort by distance" button** (only visible when location is set; toggles distance sort)
- **"Columns" button** (only in table view) — opens popover to show/hide columns and reorder via drag-and-drop
- **"Export PDF" button** — downloads PDF of results with active filters
- **"Export CSV" button** — downloads CSV to `/api/export/csv?...`

**Results Display Modes**:

1. **Card View** (default)
   - SimpleGrid: 1 col on mobile, 2 on tablet, 3 on desktop
   - Each card:
     - Institution name (dark blue, bold, clickable)
     - City, State (smaller, gray)
     - Distance (if location set) — icon + miles
     - Net Price (if shown) — icon + currency
     - Click to open detail modal

2. **List View**
   - Full-width list of institutions
   - Each row:
     - Institution name (left, clickable)
     - City, State (right)
     - Distance & net price (if applicable)
     - Hover: light background highlight
     - Click to open detail modal

3. **Table View**
   - Horizontally scrollable data table
   - Pinned "Name" column (leftmost)
   - Other columns: configurable via "Columns" button
   - Default visible columns: Name, City, State, Distance, MyPrice, + others based on `defaultVisible`
   - Column reordering via drag-and-drop
   - Sortable columns (click header to sort ASC → DESC → no sort)
   - Sorting disabled when ranking blend is active
   - Click institution row to open detail modal

4. **Map View**
   - Leaflet-based map centered on results
   - Zoom/pan to fit all institutions
   - Markers for each institution
   - Click marker to open detail modal
   - User location shown as a blue circle if set

**Pagination**
- Appears when total results > page size
- Controls:
  - Pagination component: "< 1 2 3 ... >"
  - Page size dropdown: 5, 10, 20 (default), 50, 100 options
  - Label: "Per page"
- Max 100 results displayed; if API returns >100 total, shows "X+ results" indicator

**Loading & Error States**

- Error: "Something went wrong" message + "Retry" button

##### C. Detail Modal (`InstitutionDetail`)
Triggered by clicking any institution from results view.

    - In-state & out-of-state tuition
    - Average net price
  - **"Similar Institutions"** section (links to other institutions with same characteristics)
- Close button to dismiss modal
- Responsive: full-screen on mobile, centered dialog on desktop

#### 3. About Page (`/web/src/pages/About.tsx`)

1. **Hero**
   - Icon: GraduationCap in a dark blue box

#### `ResultsList.tsx` — List view results
- Compact rows with left-to-right info:
  - Institution name (left, dark blue, bold)
  - City, State (left)
  - Distance + Net price (right, gray)
- Separator lines between rows
- Keyboard accessible: Enter/Space triggers click

#### `ResultsMap.tsx` — Leaflet-based map view
- OpenStreetMap tiles
- Markers for all institutions
- Blue circle for user location (if set)
- Auto-fit bounds to all markers
- Click marker to open detail
- Zoom/pan controls built-in

#### `ResultsTable.tsx` — Data table for comprehensive view
- Pinned "Name" column (left)
- Scrollable other columns (configurable visibility & order)
- Sortable headers (ASC → DESC → no sort)
- Hover rows for readability
- Click row to open detail modal

#### `InstitutionDetail.tsx` — Modal detail view
- Two-column layout with metrics
- Key data fields (enrollment, tuition, graduation rate, etc.)
- Renders as Modal dialog
- Close button at top-right
- Includes "Similar Institutions" section (loads related schools)

#### `SampleSearchCarousel.tsx` — Home page carousel of preset searches
- Carousel component with 6 sample searches
- Each slide: card with icon, title, description, result count preview
- Clicking card navigates to `/search?...` with preset filters
- Responsive: 1 card on mobile, 2 on tablet, 3 on desktop
- Left/right navigation arrows
- Automatic looping

#### `SampleSearchCard.tsx` — Individual sample search card
- Icon + title + description
- Shows result count badge (e.g. "45 colleges match")
- Clickable; acts as link to search results

---

### Key Interactive Features

#### 1. **Search & Filter Workflow**
- User enters filters (name, state, ranking, location, etc.)
- Filters update URL params in real-time (`?name=...&state=...&rank_us_news_national=...&page=1&pageSize=20&view=card`)
- API called with `SearchQuery` GraphQL mutation, passing filters as `FilterInput[]`
- Results rendered in chosen view mode (card/list/table/map)
- Clicking institution opens detail modal (fetches via `InstitutionDetail` query)

#### 2. **Custom Ranking Blend**
- User adjusts sliders in `RankingBlendBuilder` to weight 7 ranking sources
- Weights serialized to URL: `?blend=us-news-national:50,forbes:30,niche:20`
- API receives `rankingBlend: [{ field, weight }]` and computes blended score
- Results sorted by `blendScore` (ASC/DESC sort overridden)

#### 3. **Location-Based Features**
- Enter ZIP code or use browser geolocation
- Enables:
  - "Sort by distance" button
  - Distance display on cards/list
  - Geospatial filter (radius search)
  - Distance column in table view

#### 4. **Column Customization** (Table Mode)
- Click "Columns" button → popover
- Toggle columns on/off (checkboxes)
- Drag-and-drop to reorder (excluding pinned "Name")
- Changes persist to localStorage
- Full set of output fields loaded from API

#### 5. **Pagination**
- Load page size from URL (`?pageSize=20`)
- Clicking page number or changing page size → updates URL + page param
- Max results capped at 100; older requests show "100+ results" indicator

#### 6. **Export**
- **Export PDF**: Generates client-side PDF with:
  - Institution table (up to 100 rows)
  - Active filter list
  - Column data based on visible columns
  - Branded with Kapow header/footer
- **Export CSV**: Server-side export to `/api/export/csv?...`
  - Includes all matching results (no 100-row cap)
  - Filters, sort, location all respected

#### 7. **Authentication**
- Click "Sign In" → Google OAuth redirect
- Callback handled at `/auth/callback` (silent)
- Session stored in `useAuthStore` (Zustand)
- If logged in: User Menu with avatar, name, email, sign-out option
- User session persists across page reloads (Supabase manages session in localStorage)

#### 8. **Responsive Behavior**
- **Desktop (≥62em)**: 2-column sidebar + main (fixed layout)
- **Tablet (768–992px)**: Sidebar collapsible above results (Show/Hide Filters toggle)
- **Mobile (<768px)**: Single column, filters collapsible, table scrollable horizontally
- Header navigation: compact menu drawer on mobile, horizontal nav on desktop
- Carousel slides fewer cards on smaller screens

---

### URL Query Parameters

All filterable via search params; common examples:

| Param | Example | Effect |
|---|---|---|
| `q` (legacy) | `?q=Stanford` | Searches institution name (converted to `name=...`) |
| `name` | `?name=Stanford` | Filters by institution name substring |
| `state` | `?state=CA` | Single-select state filter |
| `rank_us_news_national` | `?rank_us_news_national=25` | Ranking range filter |
| `enrollment` | `?enrollment=0,5000` | Numeric range (min,max) |
| `fields_of_study` | `?fields_of_study=Biology` | Major substring search |
| `userLat`, `userLng` | `?userLat=37.4&userLng=-122.1` | User location (decimal degrees) |
| `userState` | `?userState=CA` | State associated with location |
| `blend` | `?blend=us-news-national:50,forbes:30` | Ranking weights |
| `sort` | `?sort=distance` | Sort field |
| `sortDir` | `?sortDir=DESC` | Sort direction (ASC/DESC) |
| `view` | `?view=table` | Results view mode (card/list/table/map) |
| `page` | `?page=2` | Pagination (1-indexed) |
| `pageSize` | `?pageSize=50` | Results per page |

---

### Demo Flow (`demo/steps.ts`)

The interactive Playwright-driven demo cycles through **16 steps**:

1. Welcome screen (home page hero)
2. Quick search input (type "Stanford")
3. Add filters (state: CA, ranking: Top 50)
4. Submit search → navigate to results
5. Browse results (highlight rows in table)
6. Ranking blend showcase (highlight slider section)
7. Column picker (show/hide table columns)
8. Filter sidebar (highlight left sidebar)
9. Pagination (show page 2, discuss per-page options)
10. Sample searches (scroll to carousel, click sample)
11. About page (navigate & scroll content)
12. Tablet view (768px viewport, show filters collapse)
13. Tablet search (show/hide filters toggle)
14. Mobile view (375px viewport, show burger menu)
15. Mobile search (show/hide filters on small screen)
16. Demo complete (return to desktop home)

---

### Summary of User Actions

A user can:

1. **Search**: Enter college name, state, ranking tier, major on home page
2. **Filter**: Use 20+ facets (academics, cost, location, outcomes, rankings, athletics, culture, climate)
3. **Customize Ranking**: Blend 7 ranking sources with sliders
4. **Set Location**: Enter ZIP code or use geolocation
5. **View Results**: Choose card, list, table, or map view
6. **Sort**: By distance, or by any column in table mode
7. **Customize Columns**: Show/hide and reorder table columns (persisted)
8. **Pagination**: Navigate between result pages (5–100 per page)
9. **Detail**: Click any institution to open modal with full details
10. **Export**: Download results as PDF or CSV
11. **Sample Searches**: Click pre-built searches for quick exploration
12. **Sign In**: Google OAuth for (future) saved searches / favorites
13. **Learn**: Read About page for data sources and methodology
14. **Responsive**: Use on desktop, tablet, or mobile — layout adapts seamlessly

All data flows through GraphQL queries (`SearchFields`, `SearchOutputFields`, `Search`, `InstitutionDetail`, `ResolveZip`) and is persisted to URL params for shareable searches.

input.content:
# E2E Test Coverage Plan for Kapow

## Context

Kapow has Playwright infrastructure in place (`web/e2e/`) but only 2 smoke tests
(hero visible, search navigates). The app has substantial interactive features —
faceted search with 48 fields, 4 result views, geographic features, ranking
blends, exports, auth, and responsive layouts — none of which have E2E coverage.

This plan identifies the critical user journeys that should be covered by E2E
tests, prioritized by regression risk and user impact.

---

## Critical E2E Test Suites (Priority Order)

### P0 — Core Search (highest risk, most users)

These flows are the product's reason to exist. A regression here breaks everyone.

1. **Basic search flow**
   - Home page quick search → results appear on `/search`
   - Search by institution name → matching results displayed
   - Search with no results → "No colleges match" message + clear filters button

2. **Filter interactions**
   - Apply a single-enum filter (e.g. state = CA) → results update, URL updates
   - Apply a numeric range filter (e.g. enrollment 0–5000) → results narrow
   - Apply multiple filters across themes → results reflect AND combination
   - Clear a filter → results widen back
   - Clear all filters → full result set returns

3. **Pagination**
   - Results show count ("Showing X–Y of Z")
   - Navigate to page 2 → different results, URL updates
   - Change page size → results per page change, resets to page 1

4. **Sorting**
   - Sort by a column in table view → results reorder
   - Toggle sort direction → order reverses

### P1 — Result Views & Detail

5. **View switching**
   - Switch between card / list / table / map views
   - Each view renders institution data (name, city, state visible)
   - View preference persists across page reload (localStorage)

6. **Institution detail**
   - Click an institution → detail modal opens with key metrics
   - Modal shows name, enrollment, tuition, graduation rate, etc.
   - Close modal → returns to results

7. **Table column customization**
   - Open column picker → toggle a column off → column disappears from table
   - Column visibility persists across reload

### P2 — Geographic Features

8. **ZIP code location**
   - Enter a valid ZIP code → resolves to location, distance appears on results
   - "Sort by distance" button appears when location is set
   - Clear location → distance column disappears

9. **Sample searches**
   - Click a sample search card on home page → navigates to `/search` with correct filters applied
   - Results appear matching the sample's criteria

### P3 — Ranking Blend & Export

10. **Custom ranking blend**
    - Adjust ranking weight sliders → blend score sorting activates
    - Results order changes based on weights
    - Reset blend → returns to default sorting

11. **CSV export**
    - Click "Export CSV" → file downloads successfully
    - Exported file contains filtered results (not all institutions)

12. **PDF export**
    - Click "Export PDF" → file downloads successfully

### P4 — Authentication

13. **Auth UI states**
    - Unauthenticated: "Sign In" button visible in header
    - Sign-in dropdown shows "Continue with Google"
    - (Full OAuth flow testing depends on test infrastructure — may need mocked auth)

### P5 — URL Shareability & Navigation

14. **Deep link / URL state**
    - Navigate directly to `/search?state=CA&enrollment=0,5000` → filters pre-populated, results match
    - Filters in sidebar reflect URL params on load

15. **Navigation**
    - Home → About → Home via header nav links
    - Logo click → returns to home from any page

### P6 — Responsive Layout

16. **Mobile layout**
    - At mobile viewport: hamburger menu appears, filters collapse
    - "Show/Hide Filters" toggle works on mobile search
    - Results display correctly in single column

---

## Test Infrastructure Needs

- **Dev server**: Add `webServer` config to `playwright.config.ts` so tests auto-start the server
- **Test data**: Tests run against the dev fixture database (via `make dev`)
- **Auth mocking**: For P4 tests, either mock Supabase or use a test account
- **CI integration**: Wire `pnpm test:e2e` into `make test-full`

---

## Implementation Approach

Each priority level becomes a separate spec file:
- `e2e/search.spec.ts` — P0
- `e2e/views-detail.spec.ts` — P1
- `e2e/geo.spec.ts` — P2
- `e2e/blend-export.spec.ts` — P3
- `e2e/auth.spec.ts` — P4
- `e2e/navigation.spec.ts` — P5 + P6

Tests use Playwright's locator API with accessible selectors (roles, labels,
placeholders) rather than CSS selectors, matching existing smoke test patterns.

---

## Verification

- Each spec runs green against `make dev` environment
- `pnpm test:e2e` passes all suites
- Tests are stable (no flaky timing issues — use `waitFor` / `networkidle` appropriately)

input.content:
# E2E Test Coverage: P0 (Core Search) + P1 (Views & Detail)

## Context

Kapow has Playwright infrastructure (`web/e2e/`, `playwright.config.ts`) but only
2 smoke tests. The app's core value — faceted search with 48 fields, 4 result
views, detail modals, and table customization — has zero E2E coverage. This plan
adds tests for the highest-risk user journeys (P0 + P1) and files issues for
the rest (P2–P6).

---

## Scope

**Implement now (P0 + P1):**
- Core search flow, filters, pagination, sorting
- View switching (card/list/table/map), detail modal, table column customization

**File as beads issues (deferred):**
- P2: Geographic features (ZIP resolution, distance sorting, sample searches)
- P3: Ranking blend & export (CSV/PDF)
- P4: Authentication UI states
- P5: URL deep links & navigation
- P6: Responsive layout

---

## Implementation

### 1. Update Playwright config

**File**: `web/playwright.config.ts`

Add `webServer` block so tests can auto-start the dev environment (or skip
gracefully if already running). Keep the existing `globalSetup` as a fallback
health check.

```ts
webServer: {
  command: 'pnpm dev',
  url: 'http://localhost:8080',
  reuseExistingServer: true,
  timeout: 30_000,
},
```

### 2. Create `e2e/search.spec.ts` — P0 Core Search

Tests run against the dev fixture database loaded by `make dev`.

**Test groups:**

#### a) Basic search flow
- Navigate to home, fill quick search name field, click Search
- Verify redirect to `/search?...` with results visible
- Verify result count displayed ("Showing X–Y of Z institutions")

#### b) Filter interactions
- Apply a single-enum filter (e.g. state dropdown) → verify URL updates, results change
- Apply a numeric range filter (e.g. enrollment slider) → results narrow
- Combine two filters from different themes → results reflect AND
- Clear one filter → results widen
- Use "Clear all filters" when no results match

#### c) Pagination
- Verify pagination controls appear when results > page size
- Click page 2 → URL updates with `page=2`, different results shown
- Change page size → resets to page 1, correct number of results

#### d) Sorting (table view)
- Click a sortable column header → results reorder, URL updates with `sort`
- Click again → direction toggles (ASC ↔ DESC)

**Key selectors** (from existing code / accessible roles):
- `page.getByPlaceholder('Name, location, or major...')` — home search input
- `page.getByRole('button', { name: 'Search' })` — search button
- `page.getByText(/Showing \d+/)` — result count
- Pagination: Mantine Pagination component renders `role="navigation"`
- Filter controls: labeled by theme sections with accessible names

### 3. Create `e2e/views-detail.spec.ts` — P1 Views & Detail

#### a) View switching
- Default view is card → verify card grid rendered
- Click list view toggle → list items appear
- Click table view toggle → table with headers appears
- Click map view toggle → map container rendered
- Reload page → view preference persists (localStorage `kapow:results-view`)

#### b) Institution detail modal
- Click an institution name/card → modal opens
- Modal displays institution name, city/state, key metrics (enrollment, tuition, etc.)
- Close modal → returns to results, results still visible

#### c) Table column customization
- In table view, click "Columns" button → picker popover opens
- Uncheck a column → column disappears from table headers
- Reload → column visibility persists (localStorage `kapow:visible-columns`)

**Key selectors:**
- View toggle: `SegmentedControl` — use `page.getByRole('radio', { name: '...' })` or label text
- Detail modal: Mantine Modal → `role="dialog"`
- Column picker: button labeled "Columns", popover with checkboxes
- Table headers: `th` elements within results table

### 4. Add shared test helpers

**File**: `e2e/helpers.ts`

Small utility functions to reduce duplication:

```ts
// Navigate to search page with pre-set filters via URL
export async function searchWith(page, params: Record<string, string>)

// Wait for search results to load (skeleton gone, results visible)
export async function waitForResults(page)

// Get the displayed result count
export async function getResultCount(page): Promise<number>
```

### 5. File beads issues for deferred test suites

Create 4 issues:

1. **E2E: Geographic features (P2)** — ZIP code resolution, distance display,
   sort by distance, sample search cards
2. **E2E: Ranking blend & export (P3)** — blend slider interaction, CSV/PDF
   download verification
3. **E2E: Authentication & preferences (P4)** — sign-in UI states, mock auth
   flow, saved preferences
4. **E2E: Navigation, URL deep links & responsive (P5+P6)** — deep link
   filter pre-population, header nav, mobile hamburger menu, filter collapse

### 6. Wire into Makefile

Add to root `Makefile`:

```makefile
web-test-e2e:        ## Run Playwright E2E tests
	cd web && pnpm test:e2e
```

Update `test-full` target to include `web-test-e2e`.

---

## Files to create/modify

| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| `web/playwright.config.ts` | Add `webServer` block |
| `web/e2e/helpers.ts` | Create — shared test utilities |
| `web/e2e/search.spec.ts` | Create — P0 core search tests |
| `web/e2e/views-detail.spec.ts` | Create — P1 views & detail tests |
| `Makefile` | Add `web-test-e2e` target, wire into `test-full` |

---

## Verification

1. Start dev environment: `make dev`
2. Run E2E suite: `cd web && pnpm test:e2e`
3. All tests pass (green) against fixture data
4. Verify deferred issues created via `bd list`

- Verify result count displayed ("Showing X–Y of Z institutions")

#### b) Filter interactions
- Apply a single-enum filter (e.g. state dropdown) → verify URL updates, results change
- Apply a numeric range filter (e.g. enrollment slider) → results narrow
- Combine two filters from different themes → results reflect AND
- Clear one filter → results widen
- Use "Clear all filters" when no results match

#### c) Pagination
- Verify pagination controls appear when results > page size
- Click page 2 → URL updates with `page=2`, different results shown
- Change page size → resets to page 1, correct number of results

#### d) Sorting (table view)
- Click a sortable column header → results reorder, URL updates with `sort`
- Click again → direction toggles (ASC ↔ DESC)

**Key selectors** (from existing code / accessible roles):
- `page.getByPlaceholder('Name, location, or major...')` — home search input
- `page.getByRole('button', { name: 'Search' })` — search button
- `page.getByText(/Showing \d+/)` — result count
- Pagination: Mantine Pagination component renders `role="navigation"`
- Filter controls: labeled by theme sections with accessible names

### 3. Create `e2e/views-detail.spec.ts` — P1 Views & Detail

#### a) View switching
- Default view is card → verify card grid rendered
- Click list view toggle → list items appear
- Click table view toggle → table with headers appears
- Click map view toggle → map container rendered
- Reload page → view preference persists (localStorage `kapow:results-view`)

#### b) Institution detail modal
- Click an institution name/card → modal opens
- Modal displays institution name, city/state, key metrics (enrollment, tuition, etc.)
- Close modal → returns to results, results still visible

#### c) Table column customization
- In table view, click "Columns" button → picker popover opens
- Uncheck a column → column disappears from table headers
- Reload → column visibility persists (localStorage `kapow:visible-columns`)

**Key selectors:**
- View toggle: `SegmentedControl` — use `page.getByRole('radio', { name: '...' })` or label text
- Detail modal: Mantine Modal → `role="dialog"`
- Column picker: button labeled "Columns", popover with checkboxes
- Table headers: `th` elements within results table

### 4. Add shared test helpers

**File**: `e2e/helpers.ts`

Small utility functions to reduce duplication:

```ts
// Navigate to search page with pre-set filters via URL
export async function searchWith(page, params: Record<string, string>)

// Wait for search results to load (skeleton gone, results visible)
export async function waitForResults(page)

// Get the displayed result count
export async function getResultCount(page): Promise<number>
```

### 5. File beads issues for deferred test suites

Create 4 issues:

1. **E2E: Geographic features (P2)** — ZIP code resolution, distance display,
   sort by distance, sample search cards
2. **E2E: Ranking blend & export (P3)** — blend slider interaction, CSV/PDF
   download verification
3. **E2E: Authentication & preferences (P4)** — sign-in UI states, mock auth
   flow, saved preferences
4. **E2E: Navigation, URL deep links & responsive (P5+P6)** — deep link
   filter pre-population, header nav, mobile hamburger menu, filter collapse

### 6. Wire into Makefile

Add to root `Makefile`:

```makefile
web-test-e2e:        ## Run Playwright E2E tests
	cd web && pnpm test:e2e
```

Update `test-full` target to include `web-test-e2e`.

---

## Files to create/modify

| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| `web/playwright.config.ts` | Add `webServer` block |
| `web/e2e/helpers.ts` | Create — shared test utilities |
| `web/e2e/search.spec.ts` | Create — P0 core search tests |
| `web/e2e/views-detail.spec.ts` | Create — P1 views & detail tests |
| `Makefile` | Add `web-test-e2e` target, wire into `test-full` |

---

## Verification

1. Start dev environment: `make dev`
2. Run E2E suite: `cd web && pnpm test:e2e`
3. All tests pass (green) against fixture data
4. Verify deferred issues created via `bd list`

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# E2E Test Coverage Plan for Kapow

## Context

Kapow has Playwright infrastructure in place (`web/e2e/`) but only 2 smoke tests
(hero visible, search navigates). The app has substantial interactive features —
faceted search with 48 fields, 4 result views, geographic features, ranking
blends, exports, auth, and responsive layouts — none of which have E2E coverage.

This plan identifies the critical user journeys that should be covered by E2E
tests, prioritized by regression risk and user impact.

---

## Critical E2E Test Suites (Priority Order)

### P0 — Core Search (highest risk, most users)

These flows are the product's reason to exist. A regression here breaks everyone.

1. **Basic search flow**
   - Home page quick search → results appear on `/search`
   - Search by institution name → matching results displayed
   - Search with no results → "No colleges match" message + clear filters button

2. **Filter interactions**
   - Apply a single-enum filter (e.g. state = CA) → results update, URL updates
   - Apply a numeric range filter (e.g. enrollment 0–5000) → results narrow
   - Apply multiple filters across themes → results reflect AND combination
   - Clear a filter → results widen back
   - Clear all filters → full result set returns

3. **Pagination**
   - Results show count ("Showing X–Y of Z")
   - Navigate to page 2 → different results, URL updates
   - Change page size → results per page change, resets to page 1

4. **Sorting**
   - Sort by a column in table view → results reorder
   - Toggle sort direction → order reverses

### P1 — Result Views & Detail

5. **View switching**
   - Switch between card / list / table / map views
   - Each view renders institution data (name, city, state visible)
   - View preference persists across page reload (localStorage)

6. **Institution detail**
   - Click an institution → detail modal opens with key metrics
   - Modal shows name, enrollment, tuition, graduation rate, etc.
   - Close modal → returns to results

7. **Table column customization**
   - Open column picker → toggle a column off → column disappears from table
   - Column visibility persists across reload

### P2 — Geographic Features

8. **ZIP code location**
   - Enter a valid ZIP code → resolves to location, distance appears on results
   - "Sort by distance" button appears when location is set
   - Clear location → distance column disappears

9. **Sample searches**
   - Click a sample search card on home page → navigates to `/search` with correct filters applied
   - Results appear matching the sample's criteria

### P3 — Ranking Blend & Export

10. **Custom ranking blend**
    - Adjust ranking weight sliders → blend score sorting activates
    - Results order changes based on weights
    - Reset blend → returns to default sorting

11. **CSV export**
    - Click "Export CSV" → file downloads successfully
    - Exported file contains filtered results (not all institutions)

12. **PDF export**
    - Click "Export PDF" → file downloads successfully

### P4 — Authentication

13. **Auth UI states**
    - Unauthenticated: "Sign In" button visible in header
    - Sign-in dropdown shows "Continue with Google"
    - (Full OAuth flow testing depends on test infrastructure — may need mocked auth)

### P5 — URL Shareability & Navigation

14. **Deep link / URL state**
    - Navigate directly to `/search?state=CA&enrollment=0,5000` → filters pre-populated, results match
    - Filters in sidebar reflect URL params on load

15. **Navigation**
    - Home → About → Home via header nav links
    - Logo click → returns to home from any page

### P6 — Responsive Layout

16. **Mobile layout**
    - At mobile viewport: hamburger menu appears, filters collapse
    - "Show/Hide Filters" toggle works on mobile search
    - Results display correctly in single column

---

## Test Infrastructure Needs

- **Dev server**: Add `webServer` config to `playwright.config.ts` so tests auto-start the server
- **Test data**: Tests run against the dev fixture database (via `make dev`)
- **Auth mocking**: For P4 tests, either mock Supabase or use a test account
- **CI integration**: Wire `pnpm test:e2e` into `make test-full`

---

## Implementation Approach

Each priority level becomes a separate spec file:
- `e2e/search.spec.ts` — P0
- `e2e/views-detail.spec.ts` — P1
- `e2e/geo.spec.ts` — P2
- `e2e/blend-export.spec.ts` — P3
- `e2e/auth.spec.ts` — P4
- `e2e/navigation.spec.ts` — P5 + P6

Tests use Playwright's locator API with accessible selectors (roles, labels,
placeholders) rather than CSS selectors, matching existing smoke test patterns.

---

## Verification

- Each spec runs green against `make dev` environment
- `pnpm test:e2e` passes all suites
- Tests are stable (no flaky timing issues — use `waitFor` / `networkidle` appropriately)

input.plan:
# E2E Test Coverage: P0 (Core Search) + P1 (Views & Detail)

## Context

Kapow has Playwright infrastructure (`web/e2e/`, `playwright.config.ts`) but only
2 smoke tests. The app's core value — faceted search with 48 fields, 4 result
views, detail modals, and table customization — has zero E2E coverage. This plan
adds tests for the highest-risk user journeys (P0 + P1) and files issues for
the rest (P2–P6).

---

## Scope

**Implement now (P0 + P1):**
- Core search flow, filters, pagination, sorting
- View switching (card/list/table/map), detail modal, table column customization

**File as beads issues (deferred):**
- P2: Geographic features (ZIP resolution, distance sorting, sample searches)
- P3: Ranking blend & export (CSV/PDF)
- P4: Authentication UI states
- P5: URL deep links & navigation
- P6: Responsive layout

---

## Implementation

### 1. Update Playwright config

**File**: `web/playwright.config.ts`

Add `webServer` block so tests can auto-start the dev environment (or skip
gracefully if already running). Keep the existing `globalSetup` as a fallback
health check.

```ts
webServer: {
  command: 'pnpm dev',
  url: 'http://localhost:8080',
  reuseExistingServer: true,
  timeout: 30_000,
},
```

### 2. Create `e2e/search.spec.ts` — P0 Core Search

Tests run against the dev fixture database loaded by `make dev`.

**Test groups:**

#### a) Basic search flow
- Navigate to home, fill quick search name field, click Search
- Verify redirect to `/search?...` with results visible
- Verify result count displayed ("Showing X–Y of Z institutions")

#### b) Filter interactions
- Apply a single-enum filter (e.g. state dropdown) → verify URL updates, results change
- Apply a numeric range filter (e.g. enrollment slider) → results narrow
- Combine two filters from different themes → results reflect AND
- Clear one filter → results widen
- Use "Clear all filters" when no results match

#### c) Pagination
- Verify pagination controls appear when results > page size
- Click page 2 → URL updates with `page=2`, different results shown
- Change page size → resets to page 1, correct number of results

#### d) Sorting (table view)
- Click a sortable column header → results reorder, URL updates with `sort`
- Click again → direction toggles (ASC ↔ DESC)

**Key selectors** (from existing code / accessible roles):
- `page.getByPlaceholder('Name, location, or major...')` — home search input
- `page.getByRole('button', { name: 'Search' })` — search button
- `page.getByText(/Showing \d+/)` — result count
- Pagination: Mantine Pagination component renders `role="navigation"`
- Filter controls: labeled by theme sections with accessible names

### 3. Create `e2e/views-detail.spec.ts` — P1 Views & Detail

#### a) View switching
- Default view is card → verify card grid rendered
- Click list view toggle → list items appear
- Click table view toggle → table with headers appears
- Click map view toggle → map container rendered
- Reload page → view preference persists (localStorage `kapow:results-view`)

#### b) Institution detail modal
- Click an institution name/card → modal opens
- Modal displays institution name, city/state, key metrics (enrollment, tuition, etc.)
- Close modal → returns to results, results still visible

#### c) Table column customization
- In table view, click "Columns" button → picker popover opens
- Uncheck a column → column disappears from table headers
- Reload → column visibility persists (localStorage `kapow:visible-columns`)

**Key selectors:**
- View toggle: `SegmentedControl` — use `page.getByRole('radio', { name: '...' })` or label text
- Detail modal: Mantine Modal → `role="dialog"`
- Column picker: button labeled "Columns", popover with checkboxes
- Table headers: `th` elements within results table

### 4. Add shared test helpers

**File**: `e2e/helpers.ts`

Small utility functions to reduce duplication:

```ts
// Navigate to search page with pre-set filters via URL
export async function searchWith(page, params: Record<string, string>)

// Wait for search results to load (skeleton gone, results visible)
export async function waitForResults(page)

// Get the displayed result count
export async function getResultCount(page): Promise<number>
```

### 5. File beads issues for deferred test suites

Create 4 issues:

1. **E2E: Geographic features (P2)** — ZIP code resolution, distance display,
   sort by distance, sample search cards
2. **E2E: Ranking blend & export (P3)** — blend slider interaction, CSV/PDF
   download verification
3. **E2E: Authentication & preferences (P4)** — sign-in UI states, mock auth
   flow, saved preferences
4. **E2E: Navigation, URL deep links & responsive (P5+P6)** — deep link
   filter pre-population, header nav, mobile hamburger menu, filter collapse

### 6. Wire into Makefile

Add to root `Makefile`:

```makefile
web-test-e2e:        ## Run Playwright E2E tests
	cd web && pnpm test:e2e
```

Update `test-full` target to include `web-test-e2e`.

---

## Files to create/modify

| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| `web/playwright.config.ts` | Add `webServer` block |
| `web/e2e/helpers.ts` | Create — shared test utilities |
| `web/e2e/search.spec.ts` | Create — P0 core search tests |
| `web/e2e/views-detail.spec.ts` | Create — P1 views & detail tests |
| `Makefile` | Add `web-test-e2e` target, wire into `test-full` |

---

## Verification

1. Start dev environment: `make dev`
2. Run E2E suite: `cd web && pnpm test:e2e`
3. All tests pass (green) against fixture data
4. Verify deferred issues created via `bd list`

file.content:
# E2E Test Coverage: P0 (Core Search) + P1 (Views & Detail)

## Context

Kapow has Playwright infrastructure (`web/e2e/`, `playwright.config.ts`) but only
2 smoke tests. The app's core value — faceted search with 48 fields, 4 result
views, detail modals, and table customization — has zero E2E coverage. This plan
adds tests for the highest-risk user journeys (P0 + P1) and files issues for
the rest (P2–P6).

---

## Scope

**Implement now (P0 + P1):**
- Core search flow, filters, pagination, sorting
- View switching (card/list/table/map), detail modal, table column customization

**File as beads issues (deferred):**
- P2: Geographic features (ZIP resolution, distance sorting, sample searches)
- P3: Ranking blend & export (CSV/PDF)
- P4: Authentication UI states
- P5: URL deep links & navigation
- P6: Responsive layout

---

## Implementation

### 1. Update Playwright config

**File**: `web/playwright.config.ts`

Add `webServer` block so tests can auto-start the dev environment (or skip
gracefully if already running). Keep the existing `globalSetup` as a fallback
health check.

```ts
webServer: {
  command: 'pnpm dev',
  url: 'http://localhost:8080',
  reuseExistingServer: true,
  timeout: 30_000,
},
```

### 2. Create `e2e/search.spec.ts` — P0 Core Search

Tests run against the dev fixture database loaded by `make dev`.

**Test groups:**

#### a) Basic search flow
- Navigate to home, fill quick search name field, click Search
- Verify redirect to `/search?...` with results visible
- Verify result count displayed ("Showing X–Y of Z institutions")

#### b) Filter interactions
- Apply a single-enum filter (e.g. state dropdown) → verify URL updates, results change
- Apply a numeric range filter (e.g. enrollment slider) → results narrow
- Combine two filters from different themes → results reflect AND
- Clear one filter → results widen
- Use "Clear all filters" when no results match

#### c) Pagination
- Verify pagination controls appear when results > page size
- Click page 2 → URL updates with `page=2`, different results shown
- Change page size → resets to page 1, correct number of results

#### d) Sorting (table view)
- Click a sortable column header → results reorder, URL updates with `sort`
- Click again → direction toggles (ASC ↔ DESC)

**Key selectors** (from existing code / accessible roles):
- `page.getByPlaceholder('Name, location, or major...')` — home search input
- `page.getByRole('button', { name: 'Search' })` — search button
- `page.getByText(/Showing \d+/)` — result count
- Pagination: Mantine Pagination component renders `role="navigation"`
- Filter controls: labeled by theme sections with accessible names

### 3. Create `e2e/views-detail.spec.ts` — P1 Views & Detail

#### a) View switching
- Default view is card → verify card grid rendered
- Click list view toggle → list items appear
- Click table view toggle → table with headers appears
- Click map view toggle → map container rendered
- Reload page → view preference persists (localStorage `kapow:results-view`)

#### b) Institution detail modal
- Click an institution name/card → modal opens
- Modal displays institution name, city/state, key metrics (enrollment, tuition, etc.)
- Close modal → returns to results, results still visible

#### c) Table column customization
- In table view, click "Columns" button → picker popover opens
- Uncheck a column → column disappears from table headers
- Reload → column visibility persists (localStorage `kapow:visible-columns`)

**Key selectors:**
- View toggle: `SegmentedControl` — use `page.getByRole('radio', { name: '...' })` or label text
- Detail modal: Mantine Modal → `role="dialog"`
- Column picker: button labeled "Columns", popover with checkboxes
- Table headers: `th` elements within results table

### 4. Add shared test helpers

**File**: `e2e/helpers.ts`

Small utility functions to reduce duplication:

```ts
// Navigate to search page with pre-set filters via URL
export async function searchWith(page, params: Record<string, string>)

// Wait for search results to load (skeleton gone, results visible)
export async function waitForResults(page)

// Get the displayed result count
export async function getResultCount(page): Promise<number>
```

### 5. File beads issues for deferred test suites

Create 4 issues:

1. **E2E: Geographic features (P2)** — ZIP code resolution, distance display,
   sort by distance, sample search cards
2. **E2E: Ranking blend & export (P3)** — blend slider interaction, CSV/PDF
   download verification
3. **E2E: Authentication & preferences (P4)** — sign-in UI states, mock auth
   flow, saved preferences
4. **E2E: Navigation, URL deep links & responsive (P5+P6)** — deep link
   filter pre-population, header nav, mobile hamburger menu, filter collapse

### 6. Wire into Makefile

Add to root `Makefile`:

```makefile
web-test-e2e:        ## Run Playwright E2E tests
	cd web && pnpm test:e2e
```

Update `test-full` target to include `web-test-e2e`.

---

## Files to create/modify

| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| `web/playwright.config.ts` | Add `webServer` block |
| `web/e2e/helpers.ts` | Create — shared test utilities |
| `web/e2e/search.spec.ts` | Create — P0 core search tests |
| `web/e2e/views-detail.spec.ts` | Create — P1 views & detail tests |
| `Makefile` | Add `web-test-e2e` target, wire into `test-full` |

---

## Verification

1. Start dev environment: `make dev`
2. Run E2E suite: `cd web && pnpm test:e2e`
3. All tests pass (green) against fixture data
4. Verify deferred issues created via `bd list`

content.thinking:
The user wants me to restructure this from an implementation plan into a plan for creating beads issues. They want two dimensions:

1. **Thoroughness tiers** (stratified):
   - **Critical/Smoke** — small set, highest value, highest importance
   - **Standard** — middle ground
   - **Comprehensive** — complete and thorough coverage

2. **Feature dimension** (orthogonal) — allows targeting specific features independently

So the issues should be organized so you can run:
- Just the critical smoke tests across all features
- All tests for a specific feature (e.g., just search filtering)
- The comprehensive suite for everything
   
I can use Playwright's tagging system with feature tags like `@search`, `@views`, `@detail`, `@geo`, `@blend`, `@export`, `@auth`, `@nav`, `@responsive` and tier tags like `@critical`, `@standard`, `@comprehensive`. Each test gets both dimensions, so I can filter by tier alone, by feature alone, or by combinations using grep commands.

Now I'm organizing this into a series of GitHub issues — one infrastructure issue for the Playwright config and tagging conventions, then one issue per feature area where each contains tests across all three tiers. The main features I'm mapping out are search, pagination, sorting, views, detail modals, column customization, and geolocation functionality.

For the tier breakdown, critical tests cover the absolute essentials like search returning results and basic filtering, standard tests expand to multiple filter types and view rendering, and comprehensive tests round out the coverage with edge cases and advanced interactions.

Now I'm organizing these into a series of issues to track.

content.text: Good feedback. Let me restructure this as a series of issues with two dimensions: thoroughness tiers and feature targeting.

input.content:
# E2E Test Coverage — Issue Plan

## Context

Kapow has Playwright infrastructure but only 2 smoke tests. This plan defines a
series of beads issues to build out E2E coverage across two orthogonal dimensions:

1. **Thoroughness tiers** — how deep the tests go
2. **Feature areas** — what functionality is being tested

This lets you run "just the critical smoke tests" across everything, "all tests
for search filtering", or "comprehensive tests for the detail modal" — any
combination.

---

## Dimensions

### Thoroughness Tiers

| Tier | Tag | Purpose | Count |
|------|-----|---------|-------|
| **Critical** | `@critical` | Bare minimum — if these fail, the product is broken. ~1-2 tests per feature. | ~12 tests |
| **Standard** | `@standard` | Solid coverage of main paths and common interactions. | ~20 tests |
| **Comprehensive** | `@comprehensive` | Edge cases, persistence, state recovery, combinations. | ~15 tests |

### Feature Areas

| Feature | Tag | What it covers |
|---------|-----|----------------|
| Search | `@search` | Home quicksearch, name/filter search, result count |
| Filters | `@filters` | Enum, range, text filters; clear; combine; no-results |
| Pagination | `@pagination` | Page nav, page size, count display |
| Sorting | `@sorting` | Column sort, direction toggle, sort + blend interaction |
| Views | `@views` | Card/list/table/map switching, persistence |
| Detail | `@detail` | Institution modal, metrics display, similar institutions |
| Columns | `@columns` | Table column picker, visibility, order, persistence |
| Geo | `@geo` | ZIP resolution, distance display, sort-by-distance |
| Blend | `@blend` | Ranking blend sliders, score sorting, reset |
| Export | `@export` | CSV download, PDF generation |
| Auth | `@auth` | Sign-in UI, user menu, preferences |
| Navigation | `@nav` | Header links, deep links, URL state round-trip |
| Responsive | `@responsive` | Mobile hamburger, filter collapse, viewport layouts |

### Running tests by dimension

```bash
# By tier
pnpm test:e2e --grep @critical        # ~12 tests, <30s
pnpm test:e2e --grep @standard         # ~20 more tests
pnpm test:e2e                          # everything

# By feature
pnpm test:e2e --grep @search
pnpm test:e2e --grep @filters
pnpm test:e2e --grep @detail

# Combined
pnpm test:e2e --grep "(?=.*@critical)(?=.*@filters)"
```

### Test annotation pattern

Each test gets both a tier tag and a feature tag in its title:

```ts
test('@critical @search home search navigates to results', ...)
test('@standard @filters numeric range narrows results', ...)
test('@comprehensive @views view preference persists across reload', ...)
```

---

## Issues

### Issue 1: E2E infrastructure & tagging convention

**Priority**: Prerequisite for all other issues

- Add `webServer` block to `playwright.config.ts` (auto-start dev server, reuse existing)
- Create `e2e/helpers.ts` with shared utilities:
  - `searchWith(page, params)` — navigate to `/search` with URL params
  - `waitForResults(page)` — wait for skeleton to clear, results visible
  - `getResultCount(page)` — parse displayed count
- Document tagging convention (`@tier @feature` in test titles)
- Add `web-test-e2e` and `web-test-e2e-critical` targets to root Makefile
- Wire `web-test-e2e` into `test-full`

### Issue 2: E2E — Search & Filters

**Feature tags**: `@search`, `@filters`

| Tier | Tests |
|------|-------|
| **Critical** | Home quicksearch → results page with results visible; Apply one filter → results change |
| **Standard** | Single-enum filter (state) narrows results; Numeric range filter (enrollment) narrows results; Full-text filter (major/field of study) returns matches; Clear one filter → results widen; Combine two filters from different themes → AND behavior |
| **Comprehensive** | Apply filter that yields zero results → "No colleges match" message + clear button; Clear all filters → full results return; Filter state reflected in URL params; Rapid filter changes don't cause stale results |

### Issue 3: E2E — Pagination & Sorting

**Feature tags**: `@pagination`, `@sorting`

| Tier | Tests |
|------|-------|
| **Critical** | Result count displayed; Click page 2 → different results shown |
| **Standard** | Page size change → correct number of results, resets to page 1; Click sortable column header → results reorder; Sort direction toggles on repeated click |
| **Comprehensive** | Pagination controls hidden when results fit one page; URL reflects page and sort state; Sort disabled when ranking blend is active |

### Issue 4: E2E — Result Views & Detail Modal

**Feature tags**: `@views`, `@detail`

| Tier | Tests |
|------|-------|
| **Critical** | Card view renders institution cards with name/city/state; Click institution → detail modal opens with name and key metrics |
| **Standard** | Switch to list view → list items rendered; Switch to table view → table with headers rendered; Switch to map view → map container rendered; Close detail modal → results still visible |
| **Comprehensive** | View preference persists across page reload (localStorage); Detail modal shows enrollment, tuition, graduation rate; Similar institutions section loads in detail modal |

### Issue 5: E2E — Table Column Customization

**Feature tag**: `@columns`

| Tier | Tests |
|------|-------|
| **Critical** | Table view shows default columns |
| **Standard** | Open column picker → uncheck column → column disappears from table; Check column back → column reappears |
| **Comprehensive** | Column visibility persists across reload (localStorage); Column order changes via picker are reflected in table |

### Issue 6: E2E — Geographic Features

**Feature tag**: `@geo`

| Tier | Tests |
|------|-------|
| **Critical** | Enter valid ZIP → location resolves, distance appears on results |
| **Standard** | "Sort by distance" button appears when location set; Clear location → distance column disappears; Sample search card on home → navigates with correct filters |
| **Comprehensive** | Invalid ZIP handled gracefully; Distance values are reasonable (not NaN/null) |

### Issue 7: E2E — Ranking Blend & Export

**Feature tags**: `@blend`, `@export`

| Tier | Tests |
|------|-------|
| **Critical** | Adjust one blend slider → results reorder |
| **Standard** | Reset blend → returns to default sorting; CSV export downloads a file; PDF export downloads a file |
| **Comprehensive** | Blend weights reflected in URL; Export respects active filters (not all institutions); Multiple blend sliders combine correctly |

### Issue 8: E2E — Auth & Preferences

**Feature tag**: `@auth`

| Tier | Tests |
|------|-------|
| **Critical** | Unauthenticated: "Sign In" button visible in header |
| **Standard** | Sign-in dropdown shows Google option; (If mock auth available) signed-in state shows user menu |
| **Comprehensive** | Preferences round-trip: save home location → reload → location persists |

*Note: Full OAuth flow requires either a test account or mock Supabase setup.*

### Issue 9: E2E — Navigation, Deep Links & Responsive

**Feature tags**: `@nav`, `@responsive`

| Tier | Tests |
|------|-------|
| **Critical** | Navigate to `/search?state=CA` → state filter pre-populated, matching results shown |
| **Standard** | Header nav: Home → About → Home works; Logo click returns to home from any page; Mobile viewport: hamburger menu appears |
| **Comprehensive** | Mobile: filter collapse toggle works; Tablet: layout adapts correctly; All filters round-trip through URL (set filter → copy URL → navigate → same state) |

---

## Issue dependency graph

```
Issue 1 (Infrastructure)
  ├── Issue 2 (Search & Filters)
  ├── Issue 3 (Pagination & Sorting)
  ├── Issue 4 (Views & Detail)
  ├── Issue 5 (Columns)
  ├── Issue 6 (Geo)
  ├── Issue 7 (Blend & Export)
  ├── Issue 8 (Auth)
  └── Issue 9 (Nav & Responsive)
```

All feature issues depend on Issue 1 (infrastructure). Feature issues are
independent of each other — can be worked in any order or in parallel.

---

## Suggested implementation order

1. **Issue 1** — Infrastructure (prerequisite)
2. **Issue 2** — Search & Filters (highest value, exercises the full stack)
3. **Issue 3** — Pagination & Sorting (extends search tests naturally)
4. **Issue 4** — Views & Detail (second most-used feature)
5. **Issue 5** — Columns (small, focused)
6. **Issues 6–9** — Remaining features (any order)
